git.pullCommits_one: Pull {{count}} commit from upstream into your local branch.
git.pullCommits_other: Pull {{count}} commits from upstream into your local branch.
git.pullUpToDate: Pull from upstream. Branch is already up to date.
git.pushNoPending: Push local commits to upstream. No local commits are pending.
git.fetchUpstream: Fetch latest refs from upstream without changing your local branch or files.

shortcuts.setupFirstShortcut: Set up your first script shortcut
shortcuts.shortcutDescription: Script shortcuts run a command in the bottom terminal so you can quickly run and test your project.
shortcuts.shortcutNote: You can always open Settings to add and manage more shortcuts later.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: The application encountered an unexpected error.
